title: LangSmith tracing middleware
goal: Enforce required trace metadata and tags for all eval and runtime requests.
constraints: Reject or fail-safe when required metadata is missing in eval/prod mode.
Tag naming must match feedback-loop.md conventions.
Do not log secrets in trace metadata.
verify_command: pnpm test --filter telemetry && pnpm test --filter tracing
definition_of_done: Traces include required profile and vector fields.
Tag sets include model, profile, preset, and suite labels.
Missing metadata paths are covered by tests.
rollback_note: If middleware blocks traffic unexpectedly, switch to warn-only mode while preserving trace writes.
